title: monardella odoratissima subsp. villosa
intro: Monardella odoratissima subsp. villosa, also known as Woolly Monardella, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family, Lamiaceae, native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Monardella odoratissima subsp. villosa include its ability to soothe sore throats, coughs, and colds, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
